title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
thunderstorms are expected today for France, Germany, Benelux, Poland, Slovakia, Hungary and maybe Czechia

The highest risks of today are 2 Slight Risks and a Hatch which are active for:

SLGT #1: NE France, Benelux, Germany

SLGT #2: SE Poland, E Slovakia, NE Hungary 

Hatch: NE France, C Germany

The main risk of the thunderstorms in #1 and Hatch will be hail and Isolated tstorms could be accompanied with wind gusts up to 95+km/h.

The risks in #2 will be mostly hail
